name: Manison #17
description: Al-Iklil, 'The Crown,' ruled by Mars, provides protection and security. Particularly powerful for protecting property, preventing theft, and ensuring the safety of valuable possessions. The crown or forehead of the Scorpion, marked by brilliant Beta and Delta Scorpii, represents vigilant protection. The artwork captures the crown's defensive power in Mars' deep red-bronze palette with fortified geometric patterns representing impenetrable security and watchful guardianship.

attributes.value: Protecting property, security measures, safeguarding valuables
